doctors.name: Dr Abid Babu
doctors.bio: Dr. Abid Babu specializes in general medicine and medical gastroenterology. He has extensive expertise in treating stomach, liver, and intestinal disorders.

doctors.name: Dr Aswanikumari S
doctors.bio: Dr. Aswanikumari S is a senior diabetologist with over 15 years of experience in managing complex diabetes cases, lifestyle modification, and preventative care.

doctors.name: Dr Bididha Biswas
doctors.image: /images/Dr Bididha Biswas gynaecologist andobstetrician and laproscopy surgeon.jpg
doctors.bio: Dr. Bididha Biswas is a highly qualified consultant gynaecologist, obstetrician, and laparoscopic surgeon specializing in women's health and minimally invasive surgeries.

doctors.name: Dr Namitha Raj
doctors.image: /images/Dr Namitha Raj Dept of Radiology Genral Practitioner.jpg
doctors.bio: Dr. Namitha Raj serves as a general practitioner with specialized experience in the department of radiology, providing core diagnostic support and primary care.

doctors.name: Dr Sahiba Rafi
availability: Monday to Saturday: 4.00 pm to 6.00 pm
doctors.bio: Dr. Sahiba Rafi is a board-certified dermatologist from AIIMS, specializing in clinical and aesthetic dermatology, acne therapy, and advanced skin care treatments.

doctors.name: Dr Sonak P
doctors.bio: Dr. Sonak P is an expert orthopedic surgeon specializing in bone and joint treatments, fracture management, and outpatient orthopedic consults.

doctors.name: Dr Nimisha Sidharth
doctors.bio: Dr. Nimisha Sidharth is a dedicated pediatrician providing comprehensive pediatric care, immunizations, and developmental tracking for infants and children.

departments.name: Orthopedics
departments.description: Comprehensive care for bones, joints, ligaments, tendons, and muscles. Our experts utilize state-of-the-art diagnostic and surgical techniques to restore your mobility.

departments.name: Pediatrics
departments.description: Dedicated to the physical, emotional, and social health of infants, children, adolescents, and young adults. We provide a warm, child-friendly environment.

departments.name: ENT (Otolaryngology)
departments.description: Expert medical and surgical evaluation and treatment of ear, nose, throat, and head & neck disorders for both adults and children.

departments.name: Dermatology
departments.description: Advanced skin care diagnostics, laser therapies, acne care, and cosmetic treatments. Our board-certified dermatologists help you achieve healthy skin.

departments.name: Diabetic Care
departments.description: Comprehensive blood sugar diagnostics, customized diet mapping, insulin guidelines, and proactive counseling for diabetic management.

departments.name: Gastroenterology
departments.description: Advanced treatment for digestive tract disorders, stomach issues, liver diseases, and colorectal diagnostics.

departments.name: Gynaecology & Obstetrics
departments.description: Dedicated women's health services, prenatal care, obstetric screenings, and advanced minimally invasive laparoscopic procedures.

departments.name: Radiology & General Practice
departments.description: Primary health consults, general diagnostic support, ultrasound scans, and digital X-ray processing.

bookings.symptoms: Knee pain after running last week.
Annual well-child checkup and school vaccinations.

enquiries.name: Alice Johnson
enquiries.subject: Insurance Coverage Question
enquiries.message: Hello, I would like to know if you accept Blue Cross Blue Shield insurance for outpatient orthopedic checkups. Thank you.

reviews.name: Rajesh Kumar
reviews.text: The care and attention I received at VMC Medical Center was outstanding. The orthopedic team helped me get back on my feet after my knee surgery. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Priya Sharma
reviews.text: Dr. Michael Chen is an exceptional pediatrician. He is so patient with my kids and always takes the time to explain everything. The virtual support chat also helped us schedule easily!

reviews.name: Amit Verma
reviews.text: I had a chronic sinus issue that other clinics couldn't resolve, but the ENT specialists at VMC diagnosed and treated it effectively. The facility is state-of-the-art.

reviews.name: Thomas Mathew
reviews.text: Excellent customer service and very clean facility. The outpatient department was prompt, and the diagnostic reports were delivered on the same day. Very professional.

reviews.name: Deepa Nair
reviews.text: High quality treatment and extremely supportive nursing staff. The booking process was seamless, and the doctor took time to answer all my questions patiently.
